title: PacBio Circular Consensus Sequencing (CCS) on the Revio platform
author: Stephanie Durgin
materials: Reagents and Consumables %s %s Reagents Generated In House %s %s

to each sample well. Add 31 μL of ligation master mix (consisting of ligation mix and ligation enhancer in a 30:1 ratio). Shake for 30 seconds on the shaker block. Incubate for 30 minutes at 20°C. 1X SMRTbell Bead Cleanup Perform a 1.0x v/v bead cleanup using a 40 μL final elution volume. Nuclease Treatment Add 10 μL of nuclease master mix (consisting of nuclease buffer and nuclease mix in a 1:1 ratio) was added to each sample well. Shake for 30 seconds on the shaker block. Incubate for 15 minutes at 37°C. Perform a 1.0x v/v bead cleanup using a 25 μL final elution volume of 10 mM Tris-HCl pH 8.0 buffer. Transfer the SMRTbell libraries to a rack of matrix tubes (Thermo Fisher Scientific, 3744).

steps.title: Using an Agilent Bravo (G5509A) and...
steps.instruction: Using an Agilent Bravo (G5509A) and 70 μL 384w Bravo Tips (19133-102), transfer 3 μL of the final SMRTbell products to the wells of the Lunatic plate (Unchained Labs, 701-2019). Open the Lunatic software and choose “Nucleic Acids”. Choose application “A260 dsDNA (turbidity)”. Select “Lunatic plate”. Name your experiment. Scan Lunatic plate ID. Select “Samples” tab and highlight the wells that contain sample. Choose the appropriate “blank” (see manufacturer guidelines). Load plate  press “Start” button. Analyze quants: If ≥15 ng/µL, proceed to Size Selection. If samples are <15 ng/µL, reach out to PacBio Tech Support for guidance.

steps.title: Calibrate PippinHT
steps.instruction: Calibrate PippinHT: Cover LED detectors with manufacturer provided fixtures and run calibration. Using an Agilent Bravo (G5509A), load samples into wells of the PippinHT 0.75% agarose cassette (Sage Sciences, HPE7550): Remove 150 μL of buffer from the upper buffer chambers & elution wells and replace it with fresh buffer; Place a strip seal from the kit over the elution wells; Perform continuity test; Add 25 μL of sample into the sample wells; Add DNA ladder into the last cassette well. Load cassette onto the PippinHT (Sage Sciences, HTP0001), Run settings: Cassette definition: 6-10 kb High Pass Marker 75E; BPstart value: 10,000 bp; BPend value: 50,000 bp; Select “Range”; Run time: 1 hour 20 minutes @ 75V. Allow cassettes to rest at room temperature for 45 minutes to increase yield. Unload samples from the cassettes using the Bravo: Transfer 30 uL out of the elution wells into sample tubes; Rinse elution wells with 30 uL of 0.1% Tween20 in low TE pH 8.0 (0.1% Tween 20, 10 mM Tris, 0.1 mM EDTA) as a wash and transfer this buffer into the sample tubes; Repeat the rinse step one time for a total sample volume of 90 uL. Perform a final 1.0X v/v SMRTbell cleanup (95 μL of SMRTBell Beads) on the STARlet liquid handler as described in “SMRTbell Library Construction” to purify size selected libraries.

steps.title: Repeat “Post SMRTbell Prep QC” steps...
steps.instruction: Repeat “Post SMRTbell Prep QC” steps to obtain a final library quant.

steps.title: Targeting a loading concentration of 215-250pM,...
steps.instruction: Targeting a loading concentration of 215-250pM, use EB (10 mM Tris HCl pH 8.0) to normalize the samples according to PacBio’s recommendations in “Sample Setup” in SMRTlink.

steps.title: Using the Hamilton STARlet the Revio...
steps.instruction: Using the Hamilton STARlet the Revio polymerase kit (Pacific Biosciences,102-739-100), add 25 μL of annealing mastermix (sequencing primer and buffer in a 1:1 ratio) to each sample well. Incubate at room temperature for 15 minutes. Add 1 μL of polymerase and 49 μL polymerase buffer to each sample. Incubate at room temperature for 15 minutes. Add 120 μL of SMRTbell beads to each sample well for 1.2X cleanup. Incubate sample with beads for 10 minutes at room temperature. Move sample plate to an Alpaqua magnet. Allow beads to separate out of the solution and remove the supernatant. Elute in 100 μL of Revio loading buffer. Incubate beads in elution buffer for 5 minutes. Move samples back to the Alpaqua magnet. Allow beads to separate out and transfer sample to a 96-well PCR plate (Eppendorf, 477-44-116). Manually dilute the Internal Control Complex (ICC) (PacBio, 103-508-800) and add to sample following PacBio’s guidelines. Store final ABC product in the dark at +4°C for up to 24 hours prior to sequencer loading.

steps.title: Thaw Revio Sequencing plate (102-587-400)
steps.instruction: Thaw Revio Sequencing plate (102-587-400). Transfer 95 μL ABC product into the empty wells (A01-D01) of the Revio Sequencing Plate using the Bravo. Scan samples into the Revio sequencing plate using the QR code on the card associated with the PacBio plate. Manually seal the sample wells with the foil seals provided within the kit (Pacific Biosciences, 100-667-400). Generate a run design using SMRTlink software or by uploading a csv file with desired run parameters. Load the Revio sequencer as described within the manufacturer’s protocol.

steps.title: When the shearing run is complete,...
steps.instruction: When the shearing run is complete, transfer samples from the shearing tubes to a barcoded Abgene 96 Well 0.8 mL Polypropylene DeepWell plate. Perform a post-shear size QC using the FemtoPulse Agilent Genomic DNA 165 kb Kit (FP-1002-

steps.title: on the Femto Pulse instrument (Agilent...
steps.instruction: on the Femto Pulse instrument (Agilent Technologies, M5330AA) according to the manufacturer’s instructions - Target shear size: 15-20 kb.

steps.title: Volume Check and Quantification A minimum...
steps.instruction: Volume Check and Quantification A minimum of 4 μg of DNA is required per attempt of SMRTbell Library Construction. Perform a volume check using a P200 pipette with wide-bore tips (Fisher Scientific, 21-236-1A) Using a Bravo liquid handling platform (Agilent Technologies, G5509A) & 70μL Agilent tips (Agilent Technologies Inc, 19133-102), transfer 3 μL aliquots of the samples to Lunatic chips (Unchained Labs, 7012019). Quantify DNA using the Lunatic UV/Vis Spectrometer (A260 dsDNA turbidity assay) to determine concentration. Calculate total mass; ensure ≥ 4 μg is available. Fragment Analysis Perform fragment analysis using the Agilent Genomic DNA 165 kb Kit (FP-1002-0275) on the Femto Pulse instrument (Agilent Technologies, M5330AA) according to the manufacturer’s instructions. Conduct a smear analysis using ProSize software (v3.0; Agilent Technologies) to calculate the percentage of DNA fragments ≥ 40 kb. Evaluate samples against the standard long-read sequencing specification: ≥ 50% of DNA > 40 kb. If target of ≥ 50% of DNA > 40kb is met, proceed to standard workflow. If target of ≥ 50% of DNA > 40kb is not met, reach out to PacBio Tech Support for guidance.

steps.title: and is fully automated on the...
steps.instruction: and is fully automated on the STARlet liquid handler equipped with Hamilton filtered Tips 50 μL (Hamilton Company, 235948), Hamilton filtered Tips 300 μL (Hamilton Company, 235903), Hamilton filtered Tips 1000 μL (Hamilton Company, 235905), an Alpaqua magnet (Alpaqua SKU: A000400), 37°C heat block, 67°C heat block, shaker, and tube chiller. Master mixes were made and added to the tube chiller according to PacBio’s SMRTbell prep protocol. Perform a 1.0X volume over volume (v/v) of SMRTbell Cleanup Beads (Pacific Biosciences, 102-158-

steps.title: Add 110 μL of SMRTbell beads...
steps.instruction: Add 110 μL of SMRTbell beads to the MIDI plate of sheared DNA. Shake for 30 seconds on the shaker block. Incubate for 10 minutes at room temperature. Transfer the MIDI plate to an Alpaqua Magnet. Allow beads to separate until liquid is clear. Remove the supernatant. Add 200 μL of 80% Ethanol to the plate. Incubate for 30 seconds and remove. Repeat ethanol wash in steps 13g and 13h. Move the MIDI plate off the Alpaqua magnet. Add 47 μL of 1X Low TE buffer (10 mM Tris-HCl, 0.1 mM EDTA, pH 8). Shake for 30 seconds on the shaker block. Incubate for 5 minutes at room temperature. Transfer the MIDI plate to an Alpaqua Magnet. Allow beads to separate until sample is clear. Transfer eluate to a clear 96-well Plate (Eppendorf, 477-44-116). DNA Repair and A-Tailing Add 14 μL of DNA repair master mix (consisting of Repair buffer, End repair mix, DNA repair mix in a 4:2:1 ratio) to each DNA sample. Mix thoroughly using the 96-head. Move plate to the 37°C heat block. Incubate for 30 minutes. Move plate to the 65°C heat block. Incubate for 5 minutes. Adapter Ligation Add 4 μL of SMRTbell adapters from SMRTbell barcoded adapter plate 3.0 (PacBio 102-009-
